headline: Oklo Advances 12% on NRC Aurora Approval: Is This the AI Infrastructure Nuclear Play?
summary: Shares of Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) are up roughly 13% in midday trading Wednesday after the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) approved the Principal Design Criteria for the company’s Aurora powerhouse. The stock trades near $77, and it’s up 59% over the past month. The move adds to a striking 12-month run for Oklo stock, now up ... Oklo Advances 12% on NRC Aurora Approval: Is This the AI Infrastructure Nuclear Play?

headline: This Boring Utility ETF Just Became a Stealth AI Play, and It’s Up 20%
summary: For most of its life, the Utilities Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLU) was the financial equivalent of a thermostat. You set it, you forgot it, and it quietly produced a check every quarter while the rest of your portfolio did the interesting work. Then artificial intelligence showed up and started plugging in server farms the ... This Boring Utility ETF Just Became a Stealth AI Play, and It’s Up 20%

headline: Out of the danger zone? Oil levels to watch before it's safe to keep buying stocks
summary: Evercore ISI believes the market comeback is in jeopardy if oil remains in the “zone of difficulty” of $93 to $98 for 3 to 4 months.
